session.user:
Run the following CI checks in the /home/runner/work/erk/erk directory. Report all errors:
1. `uv run ruff check src/ tests/` (linting) 2. `uv run ruff format --check src/ tests/` (formatting) 3. `uv run ty check src/` (type checking)
Report ALL errors, warnings, and failures. Do NOT fix anything.
session.assistant: I'll run the three CI checks in the /home/runner/work/erk/erk directory and report all errors.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check src/ tests/
Run ruff linting check on src/ and tests/

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff format --check src/ tests/
Run ruff format check on src/ and tests/

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run type checking with ty on src/

session.tool_result: Exit code 1 Would reformat: tests/commands/objective/test_remote_paths.py 1 file would be reformatted, 1213 files already formatted
session.assistant:
## CI Check Results
**Summary:**
- **ruff check (linting)**: PASSED - All checks passed - **ruff format (formatting)**: FAILED - 1 file needs reformatting - **ty check (type checking)**: PASSED - All checks passed
### Formatting Violations
**1 file would be reformatted:**
File: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/commands/objective/test_remote_paths.py`
Status: 1,213 other files already formatted correctly
